lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Very nice rosebushes you have here.

lines.speaker: Brother Althric
lines.text: Yes, it has taken me many long hours in this garden to bring them to this state of near-perfection.

sections.title: During Garden of Tranquility and Fairytale I - Growing Pains

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, brother. Could you help me with a quest, please?

lines.speaker: Brother Althric
lines.text: Yes, certainly. I'll help if I can. Which quest would you like help with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you a member of the Group of Advanced Gardeners?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Very nice rosebushes you have here.
